title: Exponential mixing property for automorphisms of compact Kähler manifolds
abstract: Let $f$ be a holomorphic automorphism of a compact Kähler manifold. Assume moreover that $f$ admits a unique maximal dynamic degree $d_p$ with only one eigenvalue of maximal modulus. Let $μ$ be its equilibrium measure. In this paper, we prove that $μ$ is exponentially mixing for all d.s.h.\ test functions.
